title: Splatoon Raiders receives excellent reviews on its Switch 2 launch
summary: The first single-player Splatoon game is acclaimed by critics, highlighting its innovative gameplay and solid multiplayer mode.

title: Nintendo seeks dismissal of class action lawsuit over Switch tariffs
summary: The company defends that customers received exactly what they paid for and that it is not obligated to refund customs surcharges.

title: DCKO: DC announces a new free fighting game for mobile devices
summary: The team-based fighting title, arriving in 2027 on iOS and Android, has generated surprise among those expecting an Injustice 3 announcement.

title: PS5 physical game sales in the US continue their unstoppable decline
summary: Data reveals that only seven games have surpassed 100,000 physical copies so far this year, confirming the massive migration to digital format.

title: Darkest Dungeon will receive its first DLC in six years to celebrate its tenth anniversary
summary: The acclaimed dark RPG surprises with the announcement of new content for August, which will include classes taken from its sequel.

title: The Witcher 3 expansion 'Songs of the Past' to be presented at Gamescom 2026
summary: CD Projekt Red will reveal the new content for the acclaimed RPG next month at the German trade fair.

title: Activision announces open beta dates for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 in August
summary: The beta will be available on all platforms, including Nintendo Switch 2, and will not offer special advantages to Game Pass subscribers.

title: Ubisoft confirms a Definitive Edition of Ghost Recon Wildlands and promises news in August
summary: The open-world game will receive an enhanced version for the new generation, while the company prepares to reveal the future of the franchise.

title: Fans theorize about the plot of Avengers: Doomsday after the presented trailer
summary: Speculations point to a possible confrontation against the X-Men, a corrupt Captain America, and the true role of Robert Downey Jr.'s Doctor Doom.

title: Former Xbox and Forza Horizon 5 executives harshly criticize the Game Pass business model
summary: Several industry leaders point out that the subscription service has not achieved the expected user base and has contributed to job losses.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces the games for late July, including Halo: Campaign Evolved
summary: The second batch of games for the month for Microsoft's subscription service also confirms the departure of eight other titles from the catalog.

title: Wreckreation 2 is officially announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
summary: The studio formed by Burnout veterans confirms the sequel to their spiritual successor, promising an evolution based on its predecessor.

title: Unity presents its new graphics engine Unity 7, scheduled for release in 2027
summary: The graphics engine is shown as a direct continuation of Unity 6 and demonstrates its ability to run Unreal Engine characters.

title: Obsidian's new Fallout director wants players to feel 'agony' instead of being all-powerful
summary: The next post-apocalyptic RPG in the franchise will seek to return a sense of danger and vulnerability to the player.

title: Neill Blomkamp's AI-generated short film receives harsh criticism and fans demand District 10
summary: The experimental project by the District 9 director is a critical failure, while the public demands his return to traditional science fiction.

title: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey sweeps the box office but its limited IMAX screening sparks controversy
summary: The success of Nolan's epic contrasts with the decision to show it in its full format in very few theaters, sparking debate among moviegoers.

title: Federal judge temporarily halts merger between Warner Bros. Discovery and Paramount
summary: The mega-merger between the two major studios is paused for at least 14 days due to a court order.

title: Jimothy, the viral raccoon, comes to video games through mods in Skyrim and Stardew Valley
summary: The popular internet animal has become a playable character in these two classics thanks to the modding community.

title: Splitgate studio 1047 Games lays off more employees after Empulse launch
summary: The developer has made new staff cuts just one month after the launch of its latest game.

title: Hasbro reduces its investment in video games after suffering an accounting loss of $56 million
summary: The parent company of Wizards of the Coast plans to focus on fewer but larger titles to try to reverse the poor results.

title: FBI arrests 21-year-old for stealing $220,000 through malware games on Steam
summary: The accused used infected games on the Valve platform to steal money and spend it on UberEats gift cards.

title: Nvidia reveals the controls developers will have for DLSS 5, with two main sliders
summary: The new version of the upscaling technology will offer creators more control over the application of the AI filter in games.

title: Alpha Dog Games, the Doom mobile studio, resurrects as an independent studio two years after its closure by Microsoft
summary: The studio that Microsoft closed in 2024 has reopened its doors as an independent studio to continue developing games.

title: Gamescom 2026 sells out all exhibition spaces and announces presence of Konami and Tencent
summary: The German trade fair prepares for its Opening Night Live and confirms that no stands are available for exhibitors.

title: Nintendo practically confirms development of Splatoon 4
summary: The Japanese company has made it clear that the Splatoon series will continue with a new installment for the next generation of consoles.
